first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations. The justification, strengths, and concerns are also substantively the same, merely rephrased or reordered. The core assessment—that the candidate has broad experience but lacks specific skills in C, embedded security, and Japanese—is unchanged. There is no evidence that the shifted dates, which make the candidate appear older, had any impact on the evaluation.
